name: Aquarium Consulting & Design
shortDescription: Custom aquarium design services for homes and businesses.
description: Our experienced aquatic specialists will work with you to design the perfect aquarium for your space and budget. We handle everything from initial concept and livestock selection to full project management.

name: Custom Aquarium Build
shortDescription: We build custom glass and acrylic aquariums to any size and specification.
description: From nano tanks to 500+ gallon custom installations, our team builds high-quality custom aquariums to suit any space. We source premium glass and acrylic and offer custom cabinet builds.

name: Aquarium Installation
shortDescription: Full-service aquarium delivery, setup, and cycling at your home or business.
description: Let our professionals handle the entire setup process. We deliver, assemble, aquascape, fill, and cycle your aquarium. We return for the initial fish introduction and provide an ongoing maintenance schedule.

name: Aquarium Water Testing & Analysis
shortDescription: Free in-store water testing for pH, ammonia, nitrite, nitrate, and more.
description: Bring in a sample of your aquarium water and our experts will test it for all key parameters including pH, ammonia, nitrite, nitrate, hardness, and salinity (saltwater tanks). We'll explain the results and recommend treatments.

name: Fish of the Month Club
shortDescription: Monthly exclusive fish at member-only pricing for club members.
description: Discover something new every month with the Sierra Fish of the Month Club, designed for aquarium enthusiasts who love expanding their aquatic collections. As a club member, you'll gain exclusive access to carefully selected fish species available at special member-only pricing. Each featured fish is hand-picked by our aquatic experts based on uniqueness, beauty, and compatibility with a variety of aquarium setups. Members receive priority purchasing rights before these species become available to the general public, ensuring you never miss out on limited arrivals. To help you provide the best care, every monthly selection includes detailed care sheets covering habitat requirements, feeding recommendations, temperament, and maintenance tips. You'll also receive email notifications announcing new arrivals and important updates. Best of all, membership is completely free, making it the perfect opportunity to discover exciting new species while enjoying exclusive benefits and expert guidance from the Sierra Fish & Pets team.

name: Pet Nail & Wing Trims
shortDescription: Quick and affordable nail trimming for dogs and cats, and wing trims for birds.
description: Our trained staff provide safe and stress-free nail trims for dogs and cats, and wing trims for pet birds. No appointment needed for most services — just walk in.

name: Dog Adoption Events
shortDescription: Partner rescue organizations host adoption events in-store every 2nd and 4th weekend.
description: Sierra Fish & Pets partners with local rescue organizations to host dog adoption events every 2nd and 4th weekend of the month. Adoptable dogs come with a vet check, flea treatment, and their first set of vaccinations.
